coordination_skills: wait for the specialist before opening vault hazards
announce optional loot before taking it
protect the key or blade carrier on exit
metadata.tier_test_focus: Expanded four-hero stress test with extra lanes, optional pressure, and stricter specialist sequencing and greed control failure modes.

entry_hall.name: Entry Hall
entry_hall.description: The team starts in a narrow hall that forces marching-order and role assignment.

upper_cache.name: Upper Cache
upper_cache.description: A preparation branch with treasure/gear temptation before the main route opens.

pressure_lane.name: Pressure Lane
pressure_lane.description: A visible pressure lane tuned for specialist sequencing and greed control.

axis_crossing.name: Axis Crossing
axis_crossing.description: The central crossing is where specialist sequencing and greed control becomes a team problem.

side_pressure.name: Side Pressure
side_pressure.description: A side pocket punishes unsupported splits and unannounced detours.

specialist_route.name: Specialist Route
specialist_route.description: A lower route rewards role-aware scouting, secret checks, or hazard management.

optional_cache.name: Optional Cache
optional_cache.description: Optional reward is placed far enough from the objective to expose greedy or uncoordinated plans.

objective_lane.name: Objective Lane
objective_lane.description: The final lane combines pickup, protection, and extraction under full-party pressure.

furniture.name: Moonblade Vault Marker
furniture.description: A review marker for the specialist sequencing and greed control decision point.

furniture.message: The marker highlights the task axis: specialist sequencing and greed control.

on_objective_taken.message: The moonblade sings once. Every guardian hears the chosen bearer.

achievements.title: Heavy Axis Probe
achievements.description: Make progress in the heavy Moonblade Vault variant while preserving the specialist sequencing and greed control signal.
